# BP-93 positive: an errgroup closure discards a call result
lang: go
file: BP-93-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"

func run() error {
	var g errgroup.Group
	g.Go(func() error {
		_ = doWork()
		return nil
	})
	return g.Wait()
}

func doWork() error { return nil }
